name: Nam Prik Pao
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons coarsely chopped dried red chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a pan.
2. Add the garlic and shallots, and fry briefly. Remove from the heat and set aside.
3. Add the dried red chiles to the hot oil and fry until they start to change color. Remove and set aside.
4. In a mortar and pestle, pound the shrimp paste.
5. Add the dried red chiles, then blend and add.
6. Add the garlic and shallots, blending each before adding the next.
7. Return all ingredients to the oil over low heat.
8. Stir until a uniform sauce forms.
9. The resulting thick, slightly oily red/black sauce will keep almost indefinitely. Adjust seasoning with more fish sauce or sugar as desired.
